title: Driver Teams — Backend: Models and API
description: Add Team model to the database. A team has a name, a date, and a list of driver members. Jobs can be assigned to a team instead of an individual driver. Add CRUD endpoints for teams and update job assignment to support teamId.
acceptanceCriteria: Team model added to schema.prisma with fields: id, name, date, createdById, createdAt
TeamMember join table added: teamId, userId (Driver role only)
Job model gets optional teamId field — assignedDriverId and teamId are mutually exclusive
POST /api/teams — create team with name, date, driverIds (Admin/Dispatcher only)
GET /api/teams?date= — list teams for a given date with members included
PATCH /api/teams/:id — update team name or members
implementationNotes: Run migration after schema changes: npx prisma migrate dev --name add-teams
Team date field is DateTime stored as start of day UTC
GET /api/jobs must include team relation when teamId is set
Job assignedDriverId and teamId should not both be set — enforce in Zod schema with .refine()
All team endpoints require authenticateToken and adminOrDispatcher middleware
